subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant, Jinab-i-Surush! Praise be to God that thou art turned unto Him, art attracted by His sweet fragrances, and art steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان جناب سروش الحمدلله متوجه الی الله و منجذب به نفحات الله و ثابت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
